parameters-en.A Level: Adjusts the output level of stereo Path A (upper).
parameters-en.A Pan: Adjusts the left/right stereo balance of Path A (upper). When set to L 100, only the left signal is passed through; when set to R 100, only the right signal is passed through.
parameters-en.B Level: Adjusts the output level of stereo Path B (lower).
parameters-en.B Pan: Adjusts the left/right stereo balance of Path B (lower). When set to L 100, only the left signal is passed through; when set to R 100, only the right signal is passed through.
parameters-en.B Polarity: Inverts the polarity of Path B. Typically, this should be set to "Normal."
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall output level of the Merge block.
